schedule.title: Opening Remarks
schedule.description: Welcome and introduction to the event.

schedule.title: The Future of AI in Web Development
schedule.description: Explore the exciting advancements of AI and its integration into modern web development workflows.

schedule.description: A deep dive into designing and implementing robust and scalable microservices using Node.js.

schedule.description: Enjoy a delicious lunch and network with fellow attendees.

schedule.title: Mastering Modern CSS Layouts
schedule.description: Unlock the power of CSS Grid and Flexbox to create stunning and responsive web layouts.

schedule.description: An introduction to blockchain technology and its practical applications for developers.

schedule.title: Effective State Management in React Applications
schedule.description: Learn best practices and patterns for managing state in complex React applications.
